messages.content:
PLEASE redraft it to more legal and formal clause and strict one 
Isratransfer unequivocally declares that it does not engage in monitoring of personal information  cell phones, such as, includingo, call lists, microphone usage, or and camera activities. Furthermore, IsraTransfer explicitly disclaims any form of access or monitoring capabilities with respect to personal cell phone data, files, photographs, or the geographical locations associated with the Tool.

IsraTransfer hereby unequivocally asserts that it shall not partake in the surveillance or monitoring of personal information stored on cell phones, encompassing call records, microphone utilization, camera operations, or other related activities. In addition, IsraTransfer explicitly denies possessing any form of authorization or capability to access or monitor personal cell phone data, files, pictures, or the geographical coordinates linked to the Tool.
Isratransfer may access the Tool only to ensure compliance with security measures related to IsraTransfer’s Platforms.
IsraTransfer may solely access the Tool for the purpose of ensuring conformity with security protocols associated with IsraTransfer's Platforms.

Employees must immediately report any lost or stolen phones to the VP of Operations. 
In such cases, IsraTransfer will immediately block access to IsraTransfer Platforms solely.

It is mandatory for employees to promptly notify the Vice President of Operations in the event of any lost or stolen phones. In such instances, IsraTransfer will expeditiously disable access exclusively to IsraTransfer Platforms.

the Company acknowledge that the its personal phone of the employee but the Employees needs to acknowledge that the tool holds the company data that must be protected in the highest degree of protection. thus, he needs to avoid given to another person to use and to safe guard the phone

The Company acknowledges that the personal phone of the employee may be used for work purposes. However, the employee is required to acknowledge that the Tool contains company data that must be safeguarded at the highest level of protection. Therefore, the employee must refrain from lending the phone to another individual and ensure the phone's security.

please write in a formal and legal way 
The Company acknowledges that the personal phone of the employee may be used for work purposes. However, the employee is required to acknowledge that the Tool contains company data that must be safeguarded at the highest level of protection. Therefore, the employee must refrain from lending the phone to another individual and ensure the phone’s security And don't leave the phone unattended

The Company hereby acknowledges that the employee's personal phone may be utilized for work-related functions. However, it is obligatory for the employee to acknowledge that the Tool comprises of sensitive company data that necessitates the utmost degree of protection. Consequently, the employee shall abstain from lending the phone to any other individual and shall actively ensure the phone's security. The employee must also refrain from leaving the phone unattended.

The Company recognizes that employees may use their personal phones for work purposes. However, employees must acknowledge that the Tool contains sensitive company data that must be protected. They are prohibited from lending the phone to others and must ensure its security, avoiding leaving it unattended.
please draft a legal and formal sentence that the employee fully read and agree to the above

The employee acknowledges that they have fully read, understood, and agrees to comply with the aforementioned provisions, including the acknowledgment that their personal phone may be used for work purposes while ensuring the protection of sensitive company data and refraining from lending the phone to others, as well as taking necessary precautions to maintain its security and avoiding leaving it unattended.

add a legal and formal clause to say that the employee request that the company deletes the  app, and the company will do so, however, the employee understands that he/she will no longer have access to the Tools on a mobile device..

Additionally, should the employee request the deletion of the app, the Company shall fulfill such request. However, the employee acknowledges and understands that by doing so, they will no longer have access to the Tools on a mobile device.
please replace additionally and should with more formal words

Furthermore, in the event that the employee formally requests the deletion of the app, the Company shall promptly comply with said request. However, it is understood by the employee that upon deletion, access to the Tools on a mobile device will no longer be available.
